steps.title: Spot the shift to another location
steps.content: After providing Brooklyn College as an example where these courses are taught, the passage immediately presents Virginia Tech University. The key signal is the movement to a different location used to support the opening claim that these courses exist “across the US” at multiple institutions.

steps.title: Match the transition to the shift
steps.content: Elsewhere literally means “in another place,” which is exactly what's needed to transition from Brooklyn College to Virginia Tech. The other three either restate the previous example, suggest a logical consequence that isn't present, or focus on specific details rather than introducing a new location. That matches choice D — D is correct.
